fuzzy_frames_ai.scheduled_gap_note: Visible queue jumps 4d -> 11d — 6-day gap in Fuzzy Pinterest schedule between days 5 and 10. Should fill with 5-6 fresh pins to avoid mid-cycle silence.
fuzzy_frames_ai.delta_vs_prior_check: +30 impressions vs 2026-05-06 (was 169). +15 audience (was 64). Engagements/saves/outbound clicks all unchanged. Impression growth slowed from yesterday's +33% to today's +18% — still positive but normalizing. Funnel still broken at click step.
fuzzy_frames_ai.note: Pins ARE going live and impressions still climbing. 0 outbound clicks across 30d remains the funnel block. Phase 2 retrofit (Amazon idea-list URLs on live Fuzzy pins) STILL not done for any Fuzzy pin — Fuzzy was the first niche to get its idea-list (5RB44WI33ISZ) but no live pin URL has been edited yet.

luxe_living_daily.delta_vs_prior_check: MAJOR: First-ever outbound click (0 -> 1) and engagements jumped (2 -> 3). Impressions +13 (91 -> 104, +14%). Audience +24 (60 -> 84, +40%). The 2 Phase 2 LLD pins flipped to Amazon idea-list URLs on 2026-05-06 (Grand Foyer + Victorian Orangery, Group A) appear to have generated the first click within ~24-48h — exactly the validation the A/B test was designed to surface.
luxe_living_daily.note: FIRST OUTBOUND CLICK in LLD account history. Coincides closely with Phase 2 pin URL retrofit pilot. Single click is not statistical proof yet — but it's the first click signal the LLD funnel has ever produced, and timing matches the Amazon-direct A/B variant going live. Decision deadline 2026-05-20: if Group A continues to outclick Group B (which still all linktree-redirected), we accelerate the LLD-wide retrofit. Action: edit the 2 Group A pins to add ascsubtag=lld_a_amzdirect so the click attribution is unambiguous.

aesthetic_spaces_co.delta_vs_prior_check: MAJOR: ASC also got its FIRST OUTBOUND CLICK ever (0 -> 1). Engagements jumped (1 -> 3). Engaged audience went 0 -> 1. Impressions +6 (21 -> 27, +29%). Audience +6 (14 -> 20, +43%). Two days ago ASC was completely flat-lined; today it has its first click. ASC tracker had `amazon_idea_list: 21BQSKV6S3ZTH` set BEFORE Fuzzy or LLD per yesterday's note ('44/44 ASC pins already pointed at Amazon. No retrofit needed there.') — meaning the click could be attributed to that Amazon-direct routing that's been live longest.
aesthetic_spaces_co.note: ASC bio URL still NOT pointing at asc.html (open todo #10) — fixing that should unlock more click volume since the bio is currently still routing to whatever default. Even so: first ASC engagement YESTERDAY, first ASC click TODAY. The smallest channel is now contributing to the funnel.

totals.note: Portfolio total: 330 impressions (+49 vs 2026-05-06, +17%), 7 engagements (+3), saves flat at 1, **2 OUTBOUND CLICKS (FIRST EVER for the portfolio — 0 yesterday, 2 today)**. The Phase 1 Amazon retrofit (114 pins now pointing at idea-lists at the tracker level) + Phase 2 pilot (2 LLD live pins flipped) appear to be producing the first click signal within 24-48h. This is the leading indicator we've been waiting for since the pivot. Both LLD and ASC contributed 1 click each. Fuzzy still 0 — and Fuzzy had the LARGEST impression base, suggesting Fuzzy's pin destinations need retrofit work next.
